name: Plus
description_short: Professional Liability Underwriting Society (PLUS) is an industry association for professional liability insurance professionals offering education, networking, and career development resources.
description_long:
The Professional Liability Underwriting Society (PLUS) is the only association created exclusively by and for the entire professional liability insurance industry. Founded to serve the professional liability insurance sector, PLUS has grown to represent a community of over 45,000 members across North America, Europe, and Asia. The organization positions itself as the exclusive hub for global professional liability insurance knowledge and industry advancement.

PLUS offers a comprehensive range of educational and professional development resources, including premier conferences and symposia (D&O, Cyber, EPL, Healthcare & Medical PL), specialized university programs with designation opportunities, monthly webinars on current industry topics, and a learning center with courses and certificates. Members gain access to networking events through 15 regional chapters, industry insights via their blog and podcast, career development resources including a Day in the Life series and career path spotlights, and volunteer opportunities for skill-building and community impact. The organization also administers awards recognizing contributions to the industry and operates the PLUS Foundation focused on workforce diversity initiatives.

PLUS distinguishes itself through exclusive focus on professional liability insurance rather than general financial services. The organization provides industry-specific designations and advanced education paths not available elsewhere, maintains a substantial member base of 45,000+ practitioners, and hosts in-person and virtual events across multiple global regions. Their content platform includes a dedicated blog and podcast with significant reach within the professional liability community.

It should be noted that PLUS is a professional association and educational organization, not a direct consumer financial services provider. The platform is designed for insurance industry professionals seeking career advancement, continuing education, and networking rather than consumers seeking personal financial assistance. While valuable for industry professionals, PLUS does not provide products or services to individual consumers managing personal finances or credit.
services: PLUS Conference and multiple specialty symposia (D&O, Cyber, EPL, Transactional Risk, Healthcare & Medical PL)
Specialized university programs with designation and certificate offerings
Monthly live virtual webinars on current professional liability topics
Regional chapter events across 15 chapters in North America, Europe, and Asia
Online learning center with courses and professional development content
PLUS Blog providing industry insights and analysis
PLUS Podcast featuring industry expert interviews and discussions
Career development resources including Day in the Life series and career path spotlights
PLUS Foundation Career Center and mentoring programs
Annual industry awards recognizing professional contributions
Networking events and community engagement platforms
pros: Community of 45,000+ professional liability insurance practitioners providing substantial networking opportunities
Multiple specialized education paths including Cyber Liability and D&O Insurance Universities with designations
Regional chapters in North America, Europe, and Asia enabling local networking and professional development
Comprehensive event calendar including 5 major symposia, monthly webinars, and virtual learning options
Industry-specific resources including blog, podcast, and career guidance tools for insurance professionals
PLUS Foundation provides diversity initiatives, mentoring, and philanthropic programs within the industry
Continuing Education (CE/CLE) credits available through symposia and educational programs
cons: Not designed for individual consumers—targets insurance industry professionals exclusively, not personal finance assistance seekers
Website content does not disclose membership fees or pricing information
Limited to professional liability insurance focus; does not address broader financial services or consumer credit needs
Requires membership to access most educational content and networking events
No indication of free or entry-level resources for professionals new to the industry without membership
best_for: Professional liability insurance underwriters and practitioners seeking career advancement
Insurance industry professionals looking for continuing education credits and specialized designations
C-suite and leadership in professional liability insurance firms needing industry networking and thought leadership
diagnosis: PLUS is a professional association exclusively serving insurance industry professionals in the professional liability sector, not a consumer finance service. This organization is best suited for insurance underwriters, risk managers, and industry executives seeking career development, continuing education, and professional networking—not for individual consumers seeking personal financial assistance, credit improvement, or emergency lending.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
